title_zh: SIMA：可扩展可指令多世界智能体
abstract_en: An agent benchmark and system spanning multiple 3D game-like environments.
abstract_zh: 跨多个 3D 类游戏环境的智能体系统与基准。
editorial_summary_zh: 世界模型与通用虚拟环境智能体的交叉案例。
editorial_summary_en: A bridge between world models and generalist virtual agents.
why_it_matters: Shows why interactive environments matter for evaluating agent planning.
